name: Lynne's Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, one egg, and oil. Set aside one cup of this mixture.
3. In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, press the remaining mixture evenly to form a crust.
4. Bake for 15 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, lemon juice, and other egg until fluffy.
6. Spread over the baked crust and sprinkle with the reserved batter on top.
7. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Cool completely and cut into bars.
